raw_consumer_statement:
Hello, As noted in the feedback I submitted earlier today ( XX/XX/year> ) regarding my prior CFPB complaint ( Case ID : XXXX ), I am opening this new complaint because the original case ( Case ID : XXXX ) remains unresolved and the CFPB feedback stage did not allow me to submit supporting documentation or evidence files. 

This new complaint is submitted to ensure that the complete factual record is clearly presented and fully reviewed. Attached to this complaint are my written response to Citibanks JXX/XX/year> response, along with the full set of supporting exhibits. These materials include order confirmations, cancellation records, payment method documentation, store pickup records, and credit card statements. 

This complaint expressly references the prior CFPB case ( Case ID : XXXX ) and is intended to supplement the record with complete documentation, so that the dispute may be reviewed and resolved based on the full and accurate facts. 

Thank you for your time and continued support.
